description: Lookup and enrich a domain: domain
name: awake-query-devices

outputs.description: Awake Security unique identifier for the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.deviceName Device name
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.deviceId

outputs.description: Date that the specified device was first seen AwakeSecurity.Devices.lastSeen Date that the specified device was last seen
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.firstSeen

outputs.description: Operating system associated with the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.deviceType Device type
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.os

outputs.description: List of IP addresses associated with the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.monitoringPointIds List of monitoring point IDs the specified device was seen on
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.ips

outputs.description: List of applications the specified device was seen using AwakeSecurity.Devices.notabilityPercentile How the notability of this device compares to other devices
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.application

outputs.description: Number of devices that are similar to this device AwakeSecurity.Devices.numberSessions Number of TCP sessions for this device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.numberSimilarDevices

outputs.description: Date of the last TCP session acknowledgment of the device associated with the specified email address AwakeSecurity.Devices.whiteListed bool
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.ackTime
